import { useContext, useEffect, useState } from "react" import { Link } from "react-router-dom" import { Context } from "./usecontext" export const Order = () => { const [d, setd] = useState([]) const { id } = useContext(Context) useEffect(() => { show() }, [id]) const show = async () => { const result = await fetch(`https://elcto-1.onrender.com/api/myorder/${id}`, { method: "get" }) if (result) { const res = await result.json() if (res.statuscode === 1) { setd(res.data) } else { alert("fg") } } } return ( <>

  • My Orders

{b.ProductName}

))}

) }
